#  Edit an RFI (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/permissions)
  * **Additional Information:**
    * This action can be performed in offline mode if the asset/item was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device. Tasks performed in offline mode will sync with Procore once a network connection is reestablished.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **RFIs** tool using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the RFI you want to edit.
  3. Tap **Edit**.
  4. Tap into a field to edit the information.
  5. Tap **Save**.


## See Also
  * [Change the Status of an RFI (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-ios/tutorials/change-the-status-of-an-rfi-ios)
  * [Email an RFI (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-ios/tutorials/email-an-rfi-ios)
  * [Mark an RFI Response as Official (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-ios/tutorials/mark-an-rfi-response-as-official-ios)
title: Edit an RFI (iOS)
description: How to edit an RFI using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
